mapper.sql: alevel_module_id, alevel_paper_id, module_code, module_name, module_type, instructions_html, instructions_text, sort_order, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM alevel_module WHERE alevel_module_id = #{moduleId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM alevel_module WHERE alevel_paper_id = #{paperId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, alevel_module_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE alevel_module SET status = 0, module_code = CONCAT('ARCHIVED_', alevel_module_id), update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE alevel_paper_id = #{paperId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1'
